reviews.comment:
Buena atención. El shop tiene horarios reducidos a mí criterio. No es muy surtido en comidas, pero el café es buenísimo. La ubicación es excelente.
No pares si querés tomar un café a la madrugada, pero durante el día es genial. Aceptan todos los medios de pago y tienen buen precio. Recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Good service. The shop's hours are a bit short in my opinion. The food selection isn't huge, but the coffee is excellent. The location is superb. Don't stop by if you want a coffee in the wee hours, but it's great during the day. They accept all forms of payment and have good prices. Recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRbXJ1Yjh3RRAB
